condition: (star_rating > 0 AND count_of_star_ratings IS NULL/0) OR (star_rating = no_review AND count_of_star_ratings > 0)
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, star_rating, count_of_star_ratings, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND ((star_rating IS NOT NULL AND star_rating NOT IN ({no_review_texts}) AND CAST(REPLACE(star_rating, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(3,1)) > 0 AND (count_of_star_ratings IS NULL OR count_of_star_ratings = '' OR count_of_star_ratings IN ({no_review_texts}) OR CAST(REPLACE(count_of_star_ratings, ',', '') AS INTEGER) = 0)) OR (star_rating IN ({no_review_texts}) AND count_of_star_ratings IS NOT NULL AND count_of_star_ratings != '' AND count_of_star_ratings NOT IN ({no_review_texts}) AND CAST(REPLACE(count_of_star_ratings, ',', '') AS INTEGER) > 0))

condition: main: main_rank IS NULL | bsr: bsr_rank IS NULL | promotion: promotion_position IS NULL
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, main_rank, bsr_rank, promotion_position, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND ((page_type = 'main' AND main_rank IS NULL) OR (page_type = 'bsr' AND bsr_rank IS NULL) OR (page_type = 'promotion' AND promotion_position IS NULL))

condition: final_sku_price > original_sku_price OR 할인율 >= 90%
error_message: 가격 이상 (final > original 또는 할인율 90% 이상)
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, final_sku_price, original_sku_price, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND final_sku_price IS NOT NULL AND original_sku_price IS NOT NULL AND final_sku_price LIKE '$%' AND original_sku_price LIKE '$%' AND final_sku_price NOT LIKE '%/month%' AND final_sku_price NOT LIKE '%/mo%' AND CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(original_sku_price, '/', 1), '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > 0 AND CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(final_sku_price, '/', 1), '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > 0 AND (CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(final_sku_price, '/', 1), '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(original_sku_price, '/', 1), '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) OR (CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(original_sku_price, '/', 1), '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(final_sku_price, '/', 1), '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) / CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(original_sku_price, '/', 1), '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * 100 >= 90)

condition: Bestbuy: promotion_position 값 존재 AND promotion_type IS NULL
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, promotion_position, promotion_type, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND account_name = 'Bestbuy' AND promotion_position IS NOT NULL AND (promotion_type IS NULL OR promotion_type = '')

condition: Amazon/Walmart: count_of_reviews > count_of_star_ratings | Bestbuy: count_of_reviews != count_of_star_ratings
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, count_of_reviews, count_of_star_ratings, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND count_of_reviews IS NOT NULL AND count_of_reviews != '' AND count_of_reviews NOT IN ({no_review_texts}) AND count_of_star_ratings IS NOT NULL AND count_of_star_ratings != '' AND count_of_star_ratings NOT IN ({no_review_texts}) AND ((account_name IN ('Amazon', 'Walmart') AND CAST(REPLACE(count_of_reviews, ',', '') AS INTEGER) > CAST(REPLACE(count_of_star_ratings, ',', '') AS INTEGER)) OR (account_name = 'Bestbuy' AND CAST(REPLACE(count_of_reviews, ',', '') AS INTEGER) != CAST(REPLACE(count_of_star_ratings, ',', '') AS INTEGER)))

condition: (리뷰수>0 AND 본문없음) OR (리뷰수=0 AND 본문있음)
error_message: 리뷰 수와 본문 존재 여부 불일치
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, count_of_reviews, detailed_review_content, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND ((count_of_reviews IS NOT NULL AND count_of_reviews != '' AND count_of_reviews NOT IN ({no_review_texts}) AND CAST(REPLACE(count_of_reviews, ',', '') AS INTEGER) > 0 AND (detailed_review_content IS NULL OR detailed_review_content = '' OR detailed_review_content IN ({no_review_texts}))) OR ((count_of_reviews IS NULL OR count_of_reviews = '' OR count_of_reviews = '0' OR count_of_reviews IN ({no_review_texts}) OR CAST(REPLACE(count_of_reviews, ',', '') AS INTEGER) = 0) AND detailed_review_content IS NOT NULL AND detailed_review_content != '' AND detailed_review_content NOT IN ({no_review_texts})))

condition: count_of_reviews > 0 AND 본문 있지만 리뷰수만큼 없음
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, count_of_reviews, detailed_review_content, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND count_of_reviews IS NOT NULL AND count_of_reviews != '' AND count_of_reviews NOT IN ({no_review_texts}) AND CAST(REPLACE(count_of_reviews, ',', '') AS INTEGER) > 0 AND detailed_review_content IS NOT NULL AND detailed_review_content != '' AND detailed_review_content NOT IN ({no_review_texts})

query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_strdatetime, star_rating, count_of_star_ratings, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND ((star_rating IS NOT NULL AND star_rating NOT IN ({no_review_texts}) AND CAST(REPLACE(star_rating, ',', '') AS DECIMAL(3,1)) > 0 AND (count_of_star_ratings IS NULL OR count_of_star_ratings = '' OR count_of_star_ratings IN ({no_review_texts}) OR CAST(REPLACE(count_of_star_ratings, ',', '') AS INTEGER) = 0)) OR (star_rating IN ({no_review_texts}) AND count_of_star_ratings IS NOT NULL AND count_of_star_ratings != '' AND count_of_star_ratings NOT IN ({no_review_texts}) AND CAST(REPLACE(count_of_star_ratings, ',', '') AS INTEGER) > 0))

condition: sentiment_score IS NOT NULL AND (count_of_reviews IS NULL OR count_of_reviews = '' OR count_of_reviews = '0' OR count_of_reviews IN no_review_texts)
error_message: sentiment 점수가 있는데 원본 리뷰 수가 NULL/빈값/0/리뷰없음
query: SELECT s.id, r.item, r.account_name, r.page_type, r.crawl_datetime, s.sentiment_score, r.count_of_reviews, r.product_url FROM tv_retail_sentiment s JOIN tv_retail_com r ON s.retail_com_id = r.id WHERE DATE(r.crawl_datetime::timestamp) = %s AND s.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(s.sentiment_score::text) NOT IN ('none', 'null', '') AND (r.count_of_reviews IS NULL OR r.count_of_reviews = '' OR r.count_of_reviews = '0' OR r.count_of_reviews IN ({no_review_texts}))

condition: sentiment_score IS NOT NULL AND (count_of_reviews IS NULL OR count_of_reviews = '' OR count_of_reviews = '0' OR count_of_reviews IN no_review_texts)
error_message: sentiment 점수가 있는데 원본 리뷰 수가 NULL/빈값/0/리뷰없음
query: SELECT s.id, r.item, r.account_name, r.page_type, r.crawl_strdatetime, s.sentiment_score, r.count_of_reviews, r.product_url FROM hhp_retail_sentiment s JOIN hhp_retail_com r ON s.retail_com_id = r.id WHERE DATE(r.crawl_strdatetime::timestamp) = %s AND s.sentiment_score IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(s.sentiment_score::text) NOT IN ('none', 'null', '') AND (r.count_of_reviews IS NULL OR r.count_of_reviews = '' OR r.count_of_reviews = '0' OR r.count_of_reviews IN ({no_review_texts}))

condition: samsung_series_name에 comp_brand가 포함된 논리 오류
query: SELECT id, samsung_series_name, comp_brand, comp_product_name, created_at FROM market_comp_product WHERE batch_id = (SELECT batch_id FROM market_comp_product WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', %s::date) ORDER BY batch_id DESC LIMIT 1) AND LOWER(samsung_series_name) LIKE '%%' || LOWER(comp_brand) || '%%'

condition:
Amazon: (유효가격 AND shipping_info NULL) OR (shipping_info 존재 AND 유효가격 아님)
※ 유효가격: $숫자, To see our price..., See price in cart
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, final_sku_price, shipping_info, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND account_name = 'Amazon' AND (((final_sku_price ~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' OR final_sku_price = 'To see our price, add this item to your cart.' OR final_sku_price = 'See price in cart') AND (shipping_info IS NULL OR shipping_info = '')) OR (shipping_info IS NOT NULL AND shipping_info != '' AND (final_sku_price IS NULL OR final_sku_price = '' OR (final_sku_price !~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' AND final_sku_price NOT IN ('To see our price, add this item to your cart.', 'See price in cart')))))

condition:
Amazon: (유효가격 AND shipping_info NULL) OR (shipping_info 존재 AND 유효가격 아님)
※ 유효가격: $숫자, To see our price..., See price in cart
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_strdatetime, final_sku_price, shipping_info, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND account_name = 'Amazon' AND (((final_sku_price ~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' OR final_sku_price = 'To see our price, add this item to your cart.' OR final_sku_price = 'See price in cart') AND (shipping_info IS NULL OR shipping_info = '')) OR (shipping_info IS NOT NULL AND shipping_info != '' AND (final_sku_price IS NULL OR final_sku_price = '' OR (final_sku_price !~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' AND final_sku_price NOT IN ('To see our price, add this item to your cart.', 'See price in cart')))))

condition:
Bestbuy/Walmart: (할인 있음 AND savings NULL) OR (savings != original - final)
※ original > final인 경우에만 검증
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, final_sku_price, original_sku_price, savings, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND account_name IN ('Bestbuy', 'Walmart') AND final_sku_price ~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' AND original_sku_price ~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' AND CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(original_sku_price, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(final_sku_price, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AND ((savings IS NULL OR savings = '') OR (savings ~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' AND ABS(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(original_sku_price, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(final_sku_price, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(savings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) > 0.01))

condition:
Bestbuy/Walmart: (할인 있음 AND savings NULL) OR (savings != original - final)
※ original > final인 경우에만 검증
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_strdatetime, final_sku_price, original_sku_price, savings, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND account_name IN ('Bestbuy', 'Walmart') AND final_sku_price ~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' AND original_sku_price ~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' AND CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(original_sku_price, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(final_sku_price, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AND ((savings IS NULL OR savings = '') OR (savings ~ '^\$[\d,]+\.?\d*$' AND ABS(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(original_sku_price, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(final_sku_price, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(savings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) > 0.01))
